# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

#[repr(u8)] pub enum mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
pub mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::DotsPerCm = 2
pub mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::DotsPerInch = 1
pub mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::None = 0
impl core::clone::Clone for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::clone(&self) -> mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::cmp::Eq for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::eq(&self, &mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit) -> bool
impl core::default::Default for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::default() -> mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::fmt::Debug for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::marker::Freeze for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::marker::Send for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit
impl core::marker::Sync for mozjpeg_rs::DensityUnit

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum mozjpeg_rs::Error
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::AllocationFailed
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::AllocationLimitExceeded
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::AllocationLimitExceeded::estimated: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::AllocationLimitExceeded::limit: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::BufferSizeMismatch
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::BufferSizeMismatch::actual: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::BufferSizeMismatch::expected: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::Cancelled
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::DimensionLimitExceeded
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::DimensionLimitExceeded::height: u32
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::DimensionLimitExceeded::max_height: u32
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::DimensionLimitExceeded::max_width: u32
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::DimensionLimitExceeded::width: u32
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::HuffmanCodeLengthOverflow
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::IccProfileTooLarge
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::IccProfileTooLarge::limit: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::IccProfileTooLarge::size: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InternalError(&'static str)
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidComponentIndex(usize)
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidDimensions
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidDimensions::height: u32
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidDimensions::width: u32
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidHuffmanTable
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidHuffmanTableIndex(usize)
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidQuality(u8)
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidQuantTableIndex(usize)
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidSamplingFactor
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidSamplingFactor::h: u8
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidSamplingFactor::v: u8
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidScanSpec
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidScanSpec::reason: &'static str
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidStride
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidStride::minimum: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::InvalidStride::stride: usize
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::IoError(alloc::string::String)
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::PixelCountExceeded
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::PixelCountExceeded::limit: u64
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::PixelCountExceeded::pixel_count: u64
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::TimedOut
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::UnsupportedColorSpace
pub mozjpeg_rs::Error::UnsupportedFeature(&'static str)
impl core::clone::Clone for mozjpeg_rs::Error
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Error::clone(&self) -> mozjpeg_rs::Error
impl core::cmp::Eq for mozjpeg_rs::Error
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for mozjpeg_rs::Error
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Error::eq(&self, &mozjpeg_rs::Error) -> bool
impl core::convert::From<alloc::collections::TryReserveError> for mozjpeg_rs::Error
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Error::from(alloc::collections::TryReserveError) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<enough::reason::StopReason> for mozjpeg_rs::Error
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Error::from(enough::reason::StopReason) -> Self
impl core::convert::From<std::io::error::Error> for mozjpeg_rs::Error
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Error::from(std::io::error::Error) -> Self

pub struct mozjpeg_rs::Encoder
impl mozjpeg_rs::Encoder
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::add_marker(self, u8, alloc::vec::Vec<u8>) -> Self

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::baseline_optimized() -> Self

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::custom_luma_qtable(self, [u16; 64]) -> Self

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_gray_cancellable(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, core::option::Option<&core::sync::atomic::AtomicBool>, core::option::Option<core::time::Duration>) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_gray_strided(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, usize) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_gray_to_writer<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, W) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<()>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_gray_with_stop(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, &dyn enough::Stop) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_rgb(&self, &[u8], u32, u32) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_rgb_cancellable(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, core::option::Option<&core::sync::atomic::AtomicBool>, core::option::Option<core::time::Duration>) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_rgb_strided(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, usize) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_rgb_to_writer<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, W) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<()>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_rgb_with_stop(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, &dyn enough::Stop) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_rgba_with_stop(&self, &[u8], u32, u32, &dyn enough::Stop) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_ycbcr_planar(&self, &[u8], &[u8], &[u8], u32, u32) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_ycbcr_planar_strided(&self, &[u8], usize, &[u8], usize, &[u8], usize, u32, u32) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_ycbcr_planar_to_writer<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &[u8], &[u8], &[u8], u32, u32, W) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<()>

pub struct mozjpeg_rs::EncodingStream<W: std::io::Write>

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::EncodingStream<W>::finish(self) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<W>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::EncodingStream<W>::write_scanlines(&mut self, &[u8]) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<()>

impl<W> core::marker::Send for mozjpeg_rs::EncodingStream<W> where W: core::marker::Send
impl<W> core::marker::Sync for mozjpeg_rs::EncodingStream<W> where W: core::marker::Sync
impl<W> core::marker::Unpin for mozjpeg_rs::EncodingStream<W> where W: core::marker::Unpin

pub struct mozjpeg_rs::Limits

pub mozjpeg_rs::Limits::max_width: u32

pub const fn mozjpeg_rs::Limits::max_height(self, u32) -> Self
pub const fn mozjpeg_rs::Limits::max_icc_profile_bytes(self, usize) -> Self
pub const fn mozjpeg_rs::Limits::max_pixel_count(self, u64) -> Self
pub const fn mozjpeg_rs::Limits::max_width(self, u32) -> Self

pub struct mozjpeg_rs::MozjpegEncodeJob
impl zencodec::traits::encoding::EncodeJob for mozjpeg_rs::codec::MozjpegEncodeJob
pub type mozjpeg_rs::codec::MozjpegEncodeJob::AnimationFrameEnc = ()
pub type mozjpeg_rs::codec::MozjpegEncodeJob::Enc = mozjpeg_rs::codec::MozjpegEncoder
pub type mozjpeg_rs::codec::MozjpegEncodeJob::Error = mozjpeg_rs::Error

pub trait mozjpeg_rs::Encode
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encode::encode_gray(&self, &[u8], u32, u32) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encode::encode_rgb(&self, &[u8], u32, u32) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub fn mozjpeg_rs::Encoder::encode_gray(&self, &[u8], u32, u32) -> mozjpeg_rs::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub trait mozjpeg_rs::EncodeablePixel: core::marker::Copy
pub const mozjpeg_rs::EncodeablePixel::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::EncodeablePixel::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn mozjpeg_rs::EncodeablePixel::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
impl mozjpeg_rs::imgref_ext::EncodeablePixel for [u8; 3]
pub const [u8; 3]::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn [u8; 3]::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn [u8; 3]::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
impl mozjpeg_rs::imgref_ext::EncodeablePixel for [u8; 4]
pub const [u8; 4]::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn [u8; 4]::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn [u8; 4]::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
impl mozjpeg_rs::imgref_ext::EncodeablePixel for rgb::formats::gray::Gray_v08<u8>
pub const rgb::formats::gray::Gray_v08<u8>::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn rgb::formats::gray::Gray_v08<u8>::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn rgb::formats::gray::Gray_v08<u8>::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
impl mozjpeg_rs::imgref_ext::EncodeablePixel for rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>
pub const rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
impl mozjpeg_rs::imgref_ext::EncodeablePixel for rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>
pub const rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
impl mozjpeg_rs::imgref_ext::EncodeablePixel for u8
pub const u8::IS_GRAYSCALE: bool
pub fn u8::to_gray(&self) -> u8
pub fn u8::to_rgb(&self) -> (u8, u8, u8)
pub type mozjpeg_rs::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, mozjpeg_rs::Error>
